<c val="ffff8a">颶風飛彈車</c>的攻擊距離提高<d ref="$UpgradeEffectArrayValue:MagFieldLaunchers:Weapon,TyphoonMissilePod,Range$"/>格。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Probes can warp in Photon Cannons to deal with most minor threats. The Spear of Adun's Orbital Strike can also help when your enemies are overwhelming you.
無定型防護雲: 探測機可躍傳光子加農砲，幾乎能對付各種小威脅。若敵人的攻勢遠大於你，此時亞頓之矛的軌道砲擊就能派上用場。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Cloaked enemies can be detected warping in Observers from the Robotics Facility, or by warping in Photon Cannons with a Probe.
無定型防護雲: 從機械製造廠躍傳觀察者，或用探測機躍傳光子加農砲，即可偵測匿蹤的敵人。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Gateway can construct a well-rounded army.  With the Warp Gate upgrade from the Cybernetics Core and the Spear of Adun's Pylon Power, Artanis can immediately reinforce his attacks.  <n/><n/>Look to the Robotics Facility and Stargate for more powerful, but more specialized forces.
無定型防護雲: 傳送門可讓你建造一支全面的軍隊。有了機械控制核心，就能將傳送門升級為空間之門，再加上亞頓之矛提供的水晶塔能量，即可讓亞坦尼斯立刻增派援軍，強化他的前線攻勢。<n/><n/>建造機械製造廠和星際之門可讓你躍傳更強大的特殊單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Artanis can shield all allied units on the map, absorbing a large amount of damage.  These shields only last for a short time, so be sure to act quickly!
無定型防護雲: 亞坦尼斯可替地圖上所有友方單位提供護盾，吸收大量傷害。這些護盾只會持續一小段時間，所以得盡快行動！

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Spear of Adun panel at the top of the screen allows you to call down powerful abilities to impact the battlefield.  Orbital Strike and Shield Overcharge cost energy, so make sure to pick your battles carefully.
無定型防護雲: 你可以利用畫面頂端的亞頓之矛面板，從星軌發動強大的技能來影響戰局。軌道砲擊和護盾超載會耗費能量，因此要慎選使用時機。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Kerrigan will sometimes activate an Assimilation Aura, reducing enemies into refined resources for both players.  Make sure to have your forces pick up any minerals and gas you see on the battlefield!
無定型防護雲: 凱莉根有時會啟動同化靈氣，將敵人轉化為玩家可用的精煉資源。別忘了讓部隊去拾取散落在戰場上的晶礦與瓦斯！

Amorphous Armorcloud: Kerrigan can unleash a mighty crushing field, stunning all enemies in a large area.  It is best to use this at a time where you and your ally can do the most damage.
無定型防護雲: 凱莉根會造成一個巨大的粉碎力場，擊暈大範圍內所有敵人。當你和盟友有辦法造成最大量的傷害時，就是使用此技能的最佳時機。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Drones can be morphed into Spine Crawlers to defend against ground enemies and Spore Crawlers to defend against air attackers.  Be wary, you may need the support of your army to hold off larger attacks.
無定型防護雲: 工蟲可以突變為脊刺爬行蟲，抵禦敵方的地面部隊，或突變為孢子爬行蟲，抵禦空中的敵人。小心，你可能還需要其他單位的支援，才能抵抗大批敵人的攻擊。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Cloaked enemies can be detected by morphing Overlords into Overseers, or by morphing Drones into Spore Crawlers.
無定型防護雲: 將王蟲變形為監察王蟲，或將工蟲突變為孢子爬行蟲，即可偵測匿蹤的敵人。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Kerrigan's swarm deals a lot of damage, but is fragile.  It is advisable to make sure Kerrigan herself is leading the charge.
無定型防護雲: 凱莉根的蟲群能造成大量傷害，但同時也很脆弱。建議先讓凱莉根打頭陣。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Raynor can frequently call in strike forces of Banshees at your request.  Look to use these when you're engaging enemy forces!
無定型防護雲: 需要時，雷諾可以頻繁呼叫女妖轟炸機部隊前來助陣。和敵人交戰時，儘管尋求它們的協助吧！
盟友技能：女妖轟炸機空襲

Amorphous Armorcloud: Raynor's primary defense is training up a lot of troops from the Barracks.  You can add additional protection for them by constructing bunkers in key locations.
無定型防護雲: 雷諾的主要防守方式是從兵營訓練大量士兵。你可以在重要地點建造碉堡，為部隊增加防護措施。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Raynor can detect cloaked enemies by training Ravens from the Starport, or constructing Missile Turrets with an SCV.<n/><n/>The Command Center can be upgraded to an Orbital Command, giving access to the Scanner Sweep ability.  This is great at detecting cloaked enemies in an emergency.
無定型防護雲: 雷諾可以在星際港訓練渡鴉，或是讓太空工程車建造飛彈砲台，來偵測匿蹤敵人。<n/><n/>指揮中心可升級為星軌指揮總部，以使用觀測儀掃描技能。需要緊急偵測匿蹤敵人時，這是個很好用的技能。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Raynor can call in the Behemoth-class battlecruiser Hyperion.  The Hyperion deals heavy damage, is very tough, and can use powerful abilities.  However, it can only stay in the battle for a short period of time before recharging, so use it wisely!
無定型防護雲: 雷諾可以呼叫巨獸級戰巡艦海伯利昂號前來支援。海伯利昂號可以造成大量傷害，非常難纏，並且能使用強大的技能。然而，海伯利昂號在戰場上出現一小段時間後就得重新充能，所以請妥善使用。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Marines and Marauders from the Barracks make for a flexible and mobile attacking force.  Medivacs from the Starport can heal them, making them much tougher in combat.
無定型防護雲: 兵營能訓練陸戰隊與掠奪者，打造一支靈活的高機動攻擊部隊。星際港能生產醫療艇，可治療部隊，讓他們在戰鬥中更加頑強。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Swann has several turrets that can be built from the SCV, each specializing against a different enemy type.  The right turrets, especially when backed up by Siege Tanks, can defend against even the most powerful enemies.
無定型防護雲: 史汪可以讓太空工程車建造數種砲台，每種砲台專門針對不同的敵人類型。只要使用適合的砲台，搭配攻城坦克，甚至能抵禦最強大的敵人。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Swann can frequently provide you with strong temporary battle vehicles.  Deploy them whenever you're about to engage enemy forces!
無定型防護雲: 史汪能頻繁為你提供強大的戰鬥載具支援，但只能使用一小段時間。你可以在與敵軍交戰前部署它們！

Amorphous Armorcloud: Swann can detect cloaked enemies by training Science Vessels from the Starport, or constructing Missile Turrets with an SCV.
無定型防護雲: 史汪可以在星際港訓練科學研究船，或者讓太空工程車建造飛彈砲台，這樣就能偵測到匿蹤的敵人。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Drakken Laser Drill can attack enemies anywhere you have vision.  Make sure to target it on tough enemies.  <n/><n/>You can upgrade the laser drill to give you bursts of extra damage when you're in a tough spot.
無定型防護雲: 達肯雷射鑽洞機可攻擊地圖上任一具有視野的地點，盡可能利用它來解決強悍的敵人。<n/><n/>你可以升級雷射鑽洞機，好在狀況危急時提供緊急的額外火力。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Swann's factory units are capable of attacking any threat you encounter.  Pay close attention to the armor types of your enemies, as most of Swann's vehicles deal bonus damage to either light or armored enemies.
無定型防護雲: 史汪的軍工廠單位可以對付任何你遇到的敵人。史汪大部分的載具單位都能對輕甲或重甲敵人造成額外傷害，所以記得先確認敵人的裝甲類型。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Drones can be morphed into Spine Crawlers to defend against ground enemies and Spore Crawlers to defend against air attackers.  Zagara also morphs units very quickly, which can be helpful in quickly rallying a defense.
無定型防護雲: 工蟲可以突變為脊刺爬行蟲，抵禦敵方的地面部隊，或突變為孢子爬行蟲，抵禦空中的敵人。札迦拉可以迅速變形單位，適合快速集結部隊，建立防線。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Zagara can cause all of your units to go into a Frenzy, increasing their movement and attack speed.  Try to make the most of these moments!
無定型防護雲: 札迦拉能讓你的所有單位進入狂亂狀態，提高他們的移動速度和攻擊速度。盡量把握機會，好好利用狂亂狀態！

Amorphous Armorcloud: Zagara's army is inexpensive and expendable.  If you have some extra resources, don't be shy about sending your units out to attack the objective.  There's always more of the Swarm!
無定型防護雲: 札迦拉的單位耗費不高，損失也不會心痛。如果你有額外的資源，儘管出動單位去攻擊目標，畢竟殺死一個蟲族，還有千千萬萬個蟲族！

Amorphous Armorcloud: Zagara can bring down drop-pods filled with a large amount of roaches to turn the tide of a major battle.  These roaches die on their own after a while, so make sure to use them aggressively!
無定型防護雲: 札迦拉能召喚空投囊孵化大量蟑螂，扭轉關鍵戰局。這些蟑螂會在一段時間後自行死亡，所以務必要讓他們盡量攻擊！

Amorphous Armorcloud: Representative of the remainder of the protoss armada at the end of the Brood War, this force was the first example of the awesome potential of Khalai and Nerazim unification.<s val="StandardTooltipHalfSize"><n/><n/></s><c val="ffff8a">Key Units</c><n/><ul indent="2" text="•"><li/>Scout<li/>Corsair<li/>Carrier<li/>Arbiter <c val="ff0000">(Hard+)</c>
無定型防護雲: 在群落戰爭結束後，現存最具代表性的神族艦隊。這支部隊是最佳範例，展現了卡萊和尼拉辛姆合作時的強大潛力<s val="StandardTooltipHalfSize"><n/><n/></s><c val="ffff8a">重要單位</c><n/><ul indent="2" text="•"><li/>斥候<li/>海盜機<li/>航空母艦<li/>審判者<c val="ff0000">(困難+)</c>

Amorphous Armorcloud: This noble and versatile force is able to quickly respond to threats to their society.<s val="StandardTooltipHalfSize"><n/><n/></s><c val="ffff8a">Key Units</c><n/><ul indent="2" text="•"><li/>Immortal<li/>Colossus<li/>High Templar <c val="ff0000">(Hard+)</c>
無定型防護雲: 這支高貴且多功能的部隊，會對造成社群威脅的勢力快速展開反擊。<s val="StandardTooltipHalfSize"><n/><n/></s><c val="ffff8a">重要單位</c><n/><ul indent="2" text="•"><li/>不朽者<li/>巨像<li/>高階聖堂武士<c val="ff0000">(困難+)</c>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Prior to the First Great War, the defense of Aiur was spearheaded by these courageous defenders.<s val="StandardTooltipHalfSize"><n/><n/></s><c val="ffff8a">Key Units</c><n/><ul indent="2" text="•"><li/>High Templar<li/>Archon<li/>Reaver<li/>Arbiter <c val="ff0000">(Hard+)</c>
無定型防護雲: 在第一次星際戰爭之前，這些勇敢的防衛者是把守艾爾的先鋒。<s val="StandardTooltipHalfSize"><n/><n/></s><c val="ffff8a">重要單位</c><n/><ul indent="2" text="•"><li/>高階聖堂武士<li/>執政官<li/>掠殺者<li/>審判者<c val="ff0000">(困難+)</c>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Modern Protoss ground force culminating in the Colossus, a robotic walker designed to incinerate large numbers of weaker targets.<s val="StandardTooltipHalfSize"><n/><n/></s><c val="ffff8a">Key Units</c><n/><ul indent="2" text="•"><li/>Immortal<li/>Colossus

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="ResearchDescSummary_Protoss">- Weapon upgrades increase attack speed by 5%.<n/>- Applies to Armory and Engineering Bay.</s><n/><n/><s val="ResearchDescription_Protoss">These self-replenishing Ultra-Capacitors reduce the reload time of all of our weapons and weapons systems. <n/><n/>Now each of the weapon upgrades in the Armory and Engineering Bay increases attack speed by 5% in addition to increasing damage.</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="TooltipTitle_Protoss">Ultra-Capacitors</s><n/><s val="TooltipDescription_Protoss">Weapon upgrades in the Armory and Engineering Bay increase attack speed by 5% in addition to increasing damage.</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="ResearchDescSummary_Protoss">- Armor upgrades increase life by 5%.<n/>- Applies to Armory and Engineering Bay.</s><n/><n/><s val="ResearchDescription_Protoss">We have created a new lightweight alloy called vanadium. Vanadium diffuses weapon impacts much more effectively than traditional armor plating, and it better preserves the life of our units.<n/><n/>Now each of the armor upgrades in the Armory and Engineering Bay increases unit life by 5% in addition to increasing armor.</s>
無定型防護雲: <s val="ResearchDescSummary_Protoss">- 裝甲升級後生命值提高5%<n/>- 適用於兵工廠和電機工程所</s><n/><n/><s val="ResearchDescription_Protoss">我們創造了一種新的輕型合金：釩。與傳統的裝甲合金比起來，釩可以更有效地吸收衝擊，保護己方單位的生命。<n/><n/>現在所有在兵工廠和電機工程所進行研發的裝甲升級除了可提高防禦之外，還可提高5%的生命值。</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="ResearchDescSummary_Protoss">- Supply Depots are built instantly.<n/><n/></s><s val="ResearchDescription_Protoss">We can now call down Supply Depots straight from orbit due to our new understanding of Protoss architecture. Key pivot joints have been added to the Supply Depot's structure, allowing the Supply Depot to survive the violent turbulence of breaking through an atmosphere.<n/><n/>Now an SCV simply has to place a Beacon, and the crew on the Hyperion will handle the rest.</s>
無定型防護雲: <s val="ResearchDescSummary_Protoss">- 瞬間建築補給站<n/><n/></s><s val="ResearchDescription_Protoss">研究了神族建築之後，我們現在可以直接從星軌空投補給站。補給站栓上了可活動的旋軸關節，減少在穿越大氣層時產生的劇烈晃動。<n/><n/>太空工程車現在只需要放置信標，海伯利昂號上的工作人員會負責之後的工作。</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="ResearchDescSummary_Protoss">- Refineries produce vespene gas 25% faster.<n/>- Also applies to the Automated Refinery.</s><n/><n/><s val="ResearchDescription_Protoss">Combining Terran and Protoss filtering techniques allows our Refineries and Automated Refineries to reclaim a higher amount of vespene gas in its purest form.</s>
無定型防護雲: <s val="ResearchDescSummary_Protoss">- 瓦斯精煉廠生產瓦斯速度提高25%<n/>- 可與自動化瓦斯精煉廠並存</s><n/><n/><s val="ResearchDescription_Protoss">結合了人類和神族的過濾技術後，我們普通和自動化的瓦斯精煉廠可用更快的速度取得大量精純的高能瓦斯。</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="TooltipTitle_Protoss">Micro-Filtering</s><n/><s val="TooltipDescription_Protoss">Refineries and Automated Refineries produce vespene gas 25% faster.</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="ResearchDescSummary_Protoss">- Refinery no longer requires SCVs to harvest vespene gas.</s><n/><n/><s val="ResearchDescription_Protoss">We have adapted Protoss warp technology to transport gas canisters straight from the Refinery to the Command Center, eliminating the need for SCVs to carry them back.<n/><n/>Why the Protoss have never thought to transport vespene in this fashion is a mystery. Perhaps they lack Terran creativity and pragmatism, or possibly their primitive superstitions forbid the practice.</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="ResearchDescSummary_Protoss">- Allows two SCVs to be trained simultaneously.</s><n/><n/><s val="ResearchDescription_Protoss">We now have the ability to train two SCVs simultaneously, allowing our early mineral and vespene production to ramp up twice as quickly.<n/><n/>This breakthrough, made possible by recent insights into Protoss containment fields, should help us get a stronger foothold early in future missions.</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: What We Do in the Shadows
Your units will not obey any command placed in areas they cannot see.
無定型防護雲: 若命令你的單位前往視野範圍外的地方，他們不會聽從。

Amorphous Armorcloud: All enemy units are permanently cloaked.
Enemy units gain increased attack speed, movement speed, armor, life, and life-regeneration when nearby enemy units die.
無定型防護雲: 敵方單位死亡時，附近還存活的敵方單位會提高攻擊速度、移動速度、裝甲值、生命值和生命值恢復速度。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enemy units and structures gain a temporary shield upon the first time they take damage.
無定型防護雲: 敵方單位和建築在第一次受到傷害時會暫時產生護盾。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Previously explored areas remain blacked out on the minimap while outside of player vision.
無定型防護雲: 只要在玩家的視野之外，就算是先前探索過的區域依然在小地圖上一片漆黑。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Storm clouds move across the map, damaging and freezing player units in their path.
無定型防護雲: 地圖上風雲密佈，玩家的單位如果接觸到，會受到傷害，並且被凍結。

Amorphous Armorcloud: New mutators are being added periodically.  See how long you can last!
無定型防護雲: 每隔一段時間會加進新的異變機制，看你能撐多久！

Amorphous Armorcloud: Uncaring automatons carry a nuclear payload toward your base. One player must discern the disarming sequence and the other player must enter it.
無定型防護雲: 無人自動化機械正把核彈運往你的基地。一名玩家可以看見解除核彈武裝的數列，而另一名玩家必須輸入數列來解除它。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Shapeless lifeforms creep toward your base, transforming all of the units and structures they touch into copies of themselves.
無定型防護雲: 奇形怪狀的生命體一步步逼近你的基地，它們會將接觸到的任何單位和建築轉化成自己的分身。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Player units are slowed by all enemy attacks.
無定型防護雲: 敵方的所有攻擊都帶有緩速效果。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Mutators are chosen at random and periodically cycle throughout the mission.
無定型防護雲: 隨機更換異變戰場，並且在任務中持續循環。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Damage dealt to enemies is split evenly across all nearby units, including your own.
無定型防護雲: 對敵人所造成的傷害會均分給附近所有單位，包括你的單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Your units also receive all the damage they deal, but they are healed over time.
無定型防護雲: 你的單位在造成傷害時，自己也會受傷，但是這些傷害會隨時間恢復。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enemy units explode and deal damage to nearby player units upon death.
無定型防護雲: 敵方單位會在死後爆炸，對附近的玩家單位造成傷害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: When enemy units and structures die, any of your nearby units are pulled to their location.
無定型防護雲: 敵方單位或建築被消滅或破壞時，位於附近的我方單位會被拉向該處。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Additional enemy units are periodically deployed onto the battlefield.
無定型防護雲: 戰場上每隔一段時間就會部署額外的敵方單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Mineral clusters at player bases are periodically encased in a shield which must be destroyed for gathering to continue.
無定型防護雲: 玩家基地的晶礦簇每隔一段時間就會產生護盾，必須先摧毀護盾才能繼續採集。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enemy units have a chance to transform into more powerful units whenever they deal damage.
無定型防護雲: 敵方單位在造成傷害之後有可能會轉化成更強大的單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Player units will occasionally stop attacking and run around in fear upon taking damage.
無定型防護雲: 玩家單位受到傷害時有可能會害怕地停止攻擊並且到處亂跑。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enemy units set the terrain on fire upon death.
無定型防護雲: 敵方單位死亡時會讓地面起火燃燒。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enemies launch a dazzling fireworks display upon death, dealing damage to your nearby units.
無定型防護雲: 敵方單位死亡時會燃放鞭炮，對附近的我方單位造成傷害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Supply can only be generated by killing turkeys that wander throughout the map. Doing so may anger the turkeys that remain.
無定型防護雲: 只有殺死在地圖上閒晃的火雞，才能提高補給值。不過殺死火雞可能會激怒其他活著的火雞。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enemy units spawn Force Fields upon death.
無定型防護雲: 敵方單位死亡時會產生力場。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Gifts are periodically deployed around the map.  If you don't claim them, Amon will!
無定型防護雲: 禮物每隔一段時間會在地圖各處出現。如果你不盡快收下禮物，亞蒙就會搶走禮物！

Amorphous Armorcloud: Areas outside of vision are completely black.
無定型防護雲: 視野之外只見一片黑暗。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enemy Heroic units reduce all incoming damage to a maximum of 10 when any non-heroic enemy unit is near them.
無定型防護雲: 敵方的非英雄單位待在身邊時，敵方英雄受到的傷害最高只有10點。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Attack waves will be joined by heroes of increasing power.
無定型防護雲: 英雄會加入攻勢一同戰鬥，這些英雄會越來越強。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enemy Hybrid units detonate a Nuke upon death.
無定型防護雲: 敵方混源體單位死亡時會引爆核彈。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enemy Infested Terrans spawn continuously around the map.
無定型防護雲: 地圖上會不斷出現受感染的人類攻擊你。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enemy Heroic units increase the attack speed and armor of all enemies within a small range.
無定型防護雲: 敵方英雄單位會提高附近小範圍內所有敵方單位的攻擊速度和護甲值。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Your units don't follow orders exactly.
無定型防護雲: 你的單位不會完全聽從命令。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enemy units are automatically revived upon death.
無定型防護雲: 敵方單位死後會自動復活。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Setting up Liberators in Defender Mode over strategic choke points makes for an effective defensive strategy.
無定型防護雲: 將解放者在重要的隘口轉換為防禦者模式，是個非常有效的防禦策略。

無定型防護雲: 在匿蹤入侵任務中，諾娃的「停火<k val="Ghost,GhostHoldFire,1,2"/>」相當實用，可以避免她自動攻擊敵方目標。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The battle spans the entire city. Use the subway system to quickly transport your army from point to point.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Construct additional Barracks or Reactor add-ons to produce multiple army units at once.
無定型防護雲: 建造更多兵營或是附屬的建築反應爐，就能同時生產更多部隊。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova has escaped from a mysterious facility where she and several other ghosts were being held captive. Unanswered questions race through her mind as she attempts to reestablish contact with the Dominion, hoping that they can shed some light on who she was with and why she was there.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃與數名幽靈特務一起被囚禁在一座神秘的設施當中，她成功逃了出來。她帶著滿腹疑問，試圖重新與自治聯盟取得聯繫，希望能知道自己當初是跟誰一起行動以及為什麼會出現在那裡。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova has learned that she is wanted for treason, having been seen working with a terrorist group known as the Defenders of Man... the same group who thwarted a sudden zerg attack on the Dominion world of Borea. Now under the Dominion's orders once again, it's up to Nova to unravel the Defenders' plans.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃得知她以叛國罪被通緝，因為有人目擊她與名為「人類守護組織」的恐怖組織一同行動...當初蟲族突襲自治聯盟領地波瑞亞，這個組織就是罪魁禍首。現在，一樣是奉自治聯盟的命令，諾娃必須揭開守護組織的陰謀。

Amorphous Armorcloud: By restoring a portion of her wiped memories, Nova has located and infiltrated a Defenders of Man base on Tarsonis. She has discovered that they are controlling their own zerg brood and using it to stage attacks on Dominion worlds across the sector. Her team now races toward an imminent zerg attack on a densely populated civilian planet.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃恢復了一部分記憶之後，找到了人類守護組織位在塔桑尼斯的基地並成功潛入。她發現他們試圖控制蟲群，並利用蟲群向整個星區內的自治聯盟領地發動攻擊。蟲族即將攻擊某個人口密集的行星，諾娃跟她的團隊正朝那裡趕去。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Though she was too late to stop the infestation of Tyrador IX, Nova has rescued the planet's civilian survivors from both the zerg and the Tal'darim. But her efforts have also strengthened the Defenders of Man, who have claimed the credit for the evacuation.
無定型防護雲: 雖然諾娃來不及阻止蟲族感染泰拉朵九號星，但她還是成功擋下蟲族與塔達力姆，拯救這顆星球的生還者；不過人類守護組織卻宣稱撤離行動成功是他們的功勞。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Having won Alarak's challenge, Nova now possesses the terrazine she needs in order to remember her history with the Defenders of Man. Despite the risks involved, she is confident that using the terrazine will reveal the identity of their leader.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃在亞拉瑞克的挑戰中獲勝了，取得恢復記憶所需要的態化氫，這樣一來就有辦法想起人類守護組織過去派她進行的任務。儘管需要冒巨大的風險，她還是相信態化氫能幫她找出幕後的主使者到底是誰。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova has learned the disturbing truth of her time with the Defenders of Man, and she now has the evidence needed to bring them to justice. But Valerian has ordered Nova to wait and trust in his plan... which involves him stepping down as emperor of the Dominion.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃已經知道她為人類守護組織完成的任務是怎麼一回事了，並且也已經找到足以將他們繩之以法的證據。不過維勒安命令諾娃暫時按兵不動，要相信他的計畫...而他的第一步卻是讓自己從自治聯盟大帝的身分退位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova has successfully infiltrated Davis's compound and has placed her under arrest. Once Valerian reveals the evidence of Davis's crimes and her leadership of the Defenders of Man at the end of his speech, the Dominion can at last return to peace.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃成功入侵了戴維斯的基地，並且逮捕了她。只要等到維勒安在演講尾聲公布戴維斯罪行的證據，以及她在人類解放組織中的領袖身分之後，自治聯盟才能恢復和平。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Together with the Dominion and defectors from the Defenders of Man, Nova has repelled the Death Fleet's attack on Vardona. But Davis has taken advantage of the battle's chaos to escape from custody. Now Nova must track her down and bring her to justice once and for all.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃和自治聯盟與人類守護組織的叛軍攜手合作，擊退了攻擊瓦多納的死亡艦隊。不過戴維斯在戰鬥中趁亂逃脫了。現在諾娃必須要追查她的行蹤，讓她受到正義的制裁。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Defenders of Man have been defeated, and Davis is dead. Having disobeyed a direct order by killing her, Nova is now on the run. Despite her fugitive status, she stands ready to lead her crew in fighting for the Dominion on their own terms.</n></n>Through the efforts of one covert operative, a conspiracy that claimed countless innocent lives has been exposed and dismantled, and order has been restored. This concludes the story of Nova Covert Ops. Thank you for all you have done.
無定型防護雲: 人類守護組織潰敗了，戴維斯也死了。諾娃違背命令殺死了戴維斯，現在正在逃亡。諾娃即便在如此狀況下，還是能領導她的成員，以他們自己的方式為自治聯盟一戰。</n></n>透過一個秘密特務的努力，終於揭開了一個奪走無數人性命的陰謀，秩序也再度恢復了。諾娃特務密令的故事在這裡告一段落，感謝你的努力和付出。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Several other ghosts were captured along with Nova. Locate and rescue them so they can fight by Nova's side.

無定型防護雲: 前往軍械庫，替諾娃裝備一把武器。

無定型防護雲: 人類守護組織正在實地測試一個實驗武器。取得這個科技，好讓萊葛研究它。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Find and recover any actionable intelligence from the Defenders of Man's communications hub.
無定型防護雲: 從人類守護組織的通訊控制中心取得情報。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Innocent civilians are taking refuge inside a local stadium. Destroy the Tal'darim Mothership before it reaches them.

無定型防護雲: 如果敵人摧毀太多萃取裝置，諾娃會同時輸掉這場挑戰與恢復記憶的機會。

無定型防護雲: 萊葛在城市的廢墟中偵測到高能量的電漿讀數。取回能量來源，讓萊葛好好研究。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova must retrace her steps in order to recall her memories and find the evidence she's looking for.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃得回顧她過往留下的線索，才能喚回記憶並且還原當時的真相。

無定型防護雲: 萊葛偵測到有研發實驗室中散發出精密的能量波形。能夠產生這種能量波形的科技一定非常厲害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: This facility houses Davis's central armory. The weaponry her forces are testing here would be a valuable addition to Nova's army.

無定型防護雲: 人類守護組織把最機密的計畫藏在重重機關之後。只有大師才有辦法入侵，取得獎勵。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Reigel has detected an unusual energy signal in the area. Whatever is emitting it could prove useful.
無定型防護雲: 萊葛偵測到不尋常的能量訊號，發射出這種信號的東西一定會相當實用。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Defenders of Man have heavily fortified their base of operations. These sewers are Nova's only way into the facility.
無定型防護雲: 人類守護組織大幅強化了基地防禦，下水道是諾娃唯一的入侵方式。

無定型防護雲: 通往戴維斯辦公室的門使用電子鎖保護。找到遙控終端機，打開電子鎖。

Amorphous Armorcloud: General Davis is located in her office, surrounded by the Defenders of Man. Find a way past her security system in order to reach her.

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Defenders of Man forces are holding this point east of the stadium to prevent the zerg from reaching the survivors.
無定型防護雲: 人類守護組織部隊正在防守體育館東側的據點，想要隔開蟲族與生還者。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The highest point on the island will serve as a staging point for intercepting the zerg.
無定型防護雲: 這座島的最高點最適合建立攔截蟲族的據點。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova and a small number of banshee ships will initiate a tactical strike here until enemy reinforcements arrive.

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Fisherman's Barracks hosts award-winning fishing and snorkeling trips during the high tourist season.
無定型防護雲: 漁人營地會在旅遊旺季主辦獎項豐富的釣魚和浮潛活動。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Ocean's Paradise Hotel is noted for having the largest infinity pool on Tyrador IX, although the nearby Imperial Resort and Suites is rumored to begin construction soon.
無定型防護雲: 海洋天堂飯店坐擁全泰拉朵九號星最大的無邊際泳池，不過據說帝國渡假大飯店也即將在附近開工了。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Shell Isle is a popular destination for day trippers. Noted for its beautiful seashells, it is separated from the mainland by water so shallow during low tide that tourists can walk to the island.
無定型防護雲: 貝殼島是大家愛去的郊遊景點，因美麗的貝殼而聞名。退潮的時候，這座島跟本土之間只以淺水相隔，遊客可以步行前往這座島。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Originally exclusive to the Old Families of the Confederacy, the Sunset Palms Hotel and Marina now provides a convenient dock for everyone.
無定型防護雲: 原本只有聯邦政府的名門望族才能使用日落棕櫚飯店與遊艇船塢，現在開放給所有民眾。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Thousands of tourists and civilian workers are waiting for evacuation in the stadium, which is normally home to the North Shore Narwhals padball team.
無定型防護雲: 幾千名觀光者和平民都在體育館裡等待撤離。這座體育館原本是北岸獨角鯨平板球隊的主場。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The zerg made landfall in the west and have established hives in the Elsecaro Coast Shoppes and the Sunset Hiking Trail.
無定型防護雲: 蟲族在西邊著陸，並且在埃瑟卡羅海岸商店街和日落健行步道建立了蟲巢。

Amorphous Armorcloud: A series of caves extends just beneath the planet's surface. The Jarban Gliders are known to inhabit them due to their secure environment.
無定型防護雲: 這顆行星的地表有一連串天然洞穴。因為環境安穩，常有加爾本翔翼獸棲息在當中。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Scans show a weak signal is emanating from this location. It could be the last known point of contact with the Umojan researchers.
無定型防護雲: 掃描顯示這個地點傳來微弱的訊號。這可能就是尤摩捷研究員最後試圖跟外界取得聯繫的地點。

Amorphous Armorcloud: This area is cleared for easy construction and features adequate minerals and vespene gas, as well as two defensible chokepoints.
無定型防護雲: 這個區域已清空，方便建立基地。此處有足夠的晶礦與高能瓦斯，並且有兩個適合防禦的要衝。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Umojan Protectorate sent a research colony here to study the native Jarban Gliders. Their devices use the creatures as a kind of biomechanical processing for the terrazine.
無定型防護雲: 尤摩捷護衛軍派遣了一支研究團隊來此研究當地的加爾本翔翼獸。他們的裝置利用這種生物，透過生物機械技術來萃取態化氫。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Alarak's warriors have gathered here to compete against Nova for control of the terrazine. Their forces indicate that they're planning for an air-based offensive attack.
無定型防護雲: 亞拉瑞克的戰士在此處跟諾娃爭奪態化氫。從他們的部隊看來，他們計畫採取以空中單位為主的攻擊行動。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Records list this area as the central hub for a secondary Umojan mining operation. They appear to have been harvesting unusual crystal formations.
無定型防護雲: 根據紀錄，這一區是第二次尤摩捷採礦行動的中樞。他們似乎是在這裡採集罕見的水晶。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Umojans established a science facility here to assist with their research. Some defensive robotic equipment was shipped here according to the logs.
無定型防護雲: 尤摩捷在此設置研究設施來協助研究的進行。根據紀錄，某種防禦機器人也被運送到此處。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Andasar Stadium was scheduled to host the Einkorns--a recently purchased padball team--but the zerg attack struck just after their arrival. None of their bodies have been identified.
無定型防護雲: 愛因柯恩這支平板球隊剛被買下不久，原本安達薩體育館要成為他們的主場，但是蟲族在他們抵達不久後發動攻擊。至今仍然沒有人能指認這些球員的屍體。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The city's docks were the busiest on Antiga, taking many military and commercial shipments. These crates were being moved to an intermediary location known affectionately as "Storeroom 10."
無定型防護雲: 這座城市的碼頭曾是全安提卡最忙碌的地方，許多的軍用與商用貨物在此往返。這些箱子被暫時安放在代號「10號倉庫」的地點。

Amorphous Armorcloud: From Nova's memories. Their significance is currently unknown.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃回想起來的座標，但是目前意義不明。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Currently occupied by infestors, but ideally situated for investigating the coordinates. Defenses needed on top and right sides.
無定型防護雲: 此處目前受到感染蟲佔據，不過很適合做為調查座標的前哨基地。需要在上方跟右方部署防線。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Before the attack, the entire city of New Andasar was connected by this subway. Now parts of it have been blocked by the infestation.
無定型防護雲: 在這場攻擊之前，這條地鐵貫通整個新安達薩城市。現在有部分區域被蟲族感染給堵住了。

Amorphous Armorcloud: If the zerg hive were cleared out, this would be an excellent mining location.
無定型防護雲: 如果能清空蟲巢，這裡會成為非常棒的採礦地點。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Though a lower population fringe world, Antiga Prime was still a key outpost of the Dominion's beloved Tasty Foody restaurant chain. The local health inspectors remained much less enthusiastic, however.
無定型防護雲: 雖然安提卡行星地處偏遠，人口不比其他行星，「食指大動」這間熱門的自治聯盟連鎖餐廳也在這裡開設重點門市。不過當地的衛生稽查員對這件事冷眼看待。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The general's forces have prohibited civilians from entering the grounds beyond this point.
無定型防護雲: 將軍的部隊不讓平民通過這個檢查哨。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova will enter Davis's compound through the sewers to avoid detection.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃會從下水道進入戴維斯的基地，避免洩漏行蹤。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The compound is equipped with a large hangar bay to store heavy assault weaponry and aircraft.
無定型防護雲: 這個基地擁有大型停泊區，停放了重型攻擊武器和空中單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Defenders of Man have constructed holding cells in this area, with advanced shielding capable of containing a ghost operative.
無定型防護雲: 人類守護組織在這裡建造了隔離室，透過先進的護盾科技關押幽靈特務。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The general has said that she will watch the speech from a secure vantage point in her office. It is expected to remain locked for that time.
無定型防護雲: 將軍說過她會在層層戒護的辦公室中觀看演講。那個時候應該無法進入辦公室。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The emperor will be delivering his speech from this balcony. A large crowd has amassed in the courtyard below, along with numerous reporters from all major Dominion media outlets.
無定型防護雲: 大帝會在這個陽台發表演說。群眾和自治聯盟主要媒體的各路記者，則會聚集在下面的庭園裡。

Amorphous Armorcloud: As a Dominion general, Davis received extensive funding for new weapons research. Her scientists have been conducting their tests in these areas.
無定型防護雲: 戴維斯身為自治聯盟將軍，擁有大量資金可研發新武器。她的科學家在這個區域進行測試。

Amorphous Armorcloud: These two terminals control the security for the door to General Davis's office. They are closely monitored by Defenders of Man personnel.
無定型防護雲: 這兩台終端機控制了戴維斯將軍辦公室的保全系統。終端機由人類守護組織的人員把守著。

Amorphous Armorcloud: A seedy but beloved city landmark, the Overdrive Bar claims that though the structure itself may have seen better days, its patrons sure haven't.
無定型防護雲: 刺激革命酒吧看起來有點落魄，卻是鎮上居民最喜歡的地方；建築物不復往日風光，但是酒客打起架來仍舊興致不減。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Lower ranking members of the Defenders of Man have rescinded their support for General Davis after seeing the evidence against her. They will do their utmost to stop the Tal'darim from advancing.
無定型防護雲: 人類守護組織的基層人員在看到許多對戴維斯將軍不利的證據之後，已經沒辦法繼續支持她。他們現在會竭盡全力阻止塔達力姆的侵略。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Admiral Horner has secured these points and intends to hold them against the Tal'darim onslaught. He will need reinforcements as the fight continues.
無定型防護雲: 霍納上將守住了這些據點，並決定在這幾處抵抗塔達力姆的入侵部隊。隨著戰事發展，他將會需要更多援軍。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova's forces must hold this point as a final defense against the Tal'darim if the Defenders of Man and Dominion armies fall.
無定型防護雲: 如果人類守護組織和自治聯盟的部隊被擊敗了，諾娃的軍力必須守住這道最後防線，才能擋住塔達力姆。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Often called the best in the Dominion, the Vardona Natural History Museum is widely known for its well-preserved ultralisk skeleton, affectionately nicknamed Fritz.
無定型防護雲: 瓦多納自然歷史博物館是自治聯盟最好的博物館，其中最著名的莫過於那保存完好的雷獸骨架，暱稱阿費。
瓦多納自然歷史博物館

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Dominion science community has been closely tracking the work here at the Vardona Research Center, which is rumored to involve highly advanced force fields.
無定型防護雲: 自治聯盟的科學界一直對瓦多納研發中心的研究項目很感興趣，尤其是那據說非常先進的力場研究。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova may expand her base into these locations to acquire additional resources over the course of the battle.
無定型防護雲: 隨著戰鬥進展，諾娃可以將勢力擴展到這些據點，獲得更多資源。

Amorphous Armorcloud: This subway connects different locations in the city, providing easy transport.
無定型防護雲: 這座地鐵通往城內的不同地點，提供快速運輸的管道。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Tal'darim invasion forces are currently located here, but may strike from different directions
無定型防護雲: 塔達力姆部隊目前位於此處，但是他們有可能從不同方向進攻。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Nova and her forces will establish their base in the southernmost area of the shipyard.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃和她的軍力會在船塢最南方建立基地。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Gorgon-class battlecruisers are refueled here before leaving the shipyards.
無定型防護雲: 蛇女級戰巡艦離開船塢前，會在這裡補充燃料。

Amorphous Armorcloud: These dry docked ships cannot attack while they are being repaired. Nova must defend them from General Davis's attacks.
無定型防護雲: 這些待維修的蛇女級戰巡艦在維修結束前無法發動攻擊，諾娃必須保護它們，以免被戴維斯將軍摧毀。
自治聯盟蛇女級戰巡艦

Amorphous Armorcloud: It is standard procedure to disarm Gorgons during repairs. Their J23 missiles are carefully stored on the platform until maintenance has concluded.
無定型防護雲: 維修蛇女級戰巡艦時依照標準操作程序必須先解除武裝，此時飛彈會小心保存於平台上的飛彈存放區，直到維修工作結束。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Defenders of Man have fortified their presence in this area to prevent Nova and her allies from getting closer to the Xanthos's repair location
無定型防護雲: 人類守護組織為了阻止諾娃及其盟友接近桑托斯修理站，決定提高這個區域的軍力。

Amorphous Armorcloud: A diligent squadron of repair bots maintains the infrastructure of the Cerros Shipyards. They can usually be sighted working around the platform's edges, out of the way of general traffic.
無定型防護雲: 賽洛斯船塢的基礎設施由一群機器人負責維護，你可以在平台外圍看到它們避開一般行進路線，勤勉不懈地工作。

Amorphous Armorcloud: This unparalleled war machine can be equipped with a flamethrower, rail gun, aircraft bay, and missile arsenal. Additional combat modes remain classified.
無定型防護雲: 這無以倫比的戰爭機器可以裝備火焰噴射器、電磁軌槍、飛行單位起降埠和飛彈發射器，除此之外還有最高機密的戰鬥模式。
<s val="NovaBreakingNewsCallout1">為您插播</s><n/><s val="NovaBreakingNewsCallout2">最新消息</s><n/><s val="NovaBreakingNewsCallout3">凱特‧羅克韋爾在此為您報導</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Deals up to <d ref="Effect,NovaGadgetPulseGrenadesDamage,Amount"/> damage to enemy ground and air units in the target area. Does not damage friendly units.
無定型防護雲: 最多可對目標範圍內的敵方地面及空中單位造成<d ref="Effect,NovaGadgetPulseGrenadesDamage,Amount"/>點傷害。不會對友方單位造成傷害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Pulse grenades utilize a concentrated energy burst to create a powerful explosion within a small radius, making them an effective anti-personnel option for ghosts who are operating in enclosed environments.
無定型防護雲: 脈衝手榴彈會在小範圍內爆發壓縮的能量，能有效對付位在密閉空間內的幽靈特務等人員單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Stuns and disables the detection of enemy ground and air units in the target area for <d ref="Behavior,FlashBangGrenade,Duration"/> seconds. Massive units and friendly units are immune.
無定型防護雲: 擊暈目標區域內的敵方地面及空中單位，並且使其無法使用偵測功能，持續<d ref="Behavior,FlashBangGrenade,Duration"/>秒。不會影響巨型單位及友方單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The technology for flashbang grenades is far older than the Confederacy, yet they continue to warrant a place in modern arsenals. Their detonation disorients hostile combatants in a large radius.
無定型防護雲: 閃光手榴彈所使用的技術比聯邦政府還要古老，但是它在現代作戰仍占有一席之地。引爆後可暈眩大範圍內的敵方單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases attack speed and movement speeds by <d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Modification.AttackSpeedMultiplier *100-100"/>% for <d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Duration"/> seconds. Heals Nova for <d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Life]*Behavior,SuperStimNova,Duration"/> life over the effect's duration.
無定型防護雲: 攻擊速度及移動速度提高<d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Modification.AttackSpeedMultiplier *100-100"/>%，持續<d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Duration"/>秒。在此效果持續時間內，替諾娃恢復<d ref="Behavior,SuperStimNova,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Life]*Behavior,SuperStimNova,Duration"/>點生命值。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Administering stimulants to high PI subjects such as ghosts has historically been considered extremely dangerous. New and improved stim formulation, however has alleviated most of those concerns.
無定型防護雲: 以往對高幽能指數對象（例如幽靈特務）注射戰鬥藥劑的風險非常高，但全新改良的戰鬥藥劑配方可以解決這個困擾。

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Stim Infusion</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Heals Nova over time and temporarily increases her attack and movement speeds.</s>
無定型防護雲: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">戰鬥藥劑注射器</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">在一定時間內持續為諾娃恢復生命值，並且暫時提高她的攻擊速度和移動速度。</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Deploys a holographic duplicate of Nova that can be controlled. The hologram deals 25% of Nova's damage and takes 25% less damage.
無定型防護雲: 投射一個可讓玩家控制的諾娃全像投影。這個投影造成的傷害值相當於諾娃的一半，但是也會額外受到50%的傷害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Repurposed from prototype communications technology, holographic decoys are convincing in appearance but are far from being solid matter. Though they cannot comprise an entire army, they function quite well as reinforcements.
無定型防護雲: 全像投影誘餌是轉化原型通訊科技所研發而成，雖然不具實體，但是外觀幾可亂真。儘管不能光憑投影大軍贏得戰爭，但是它們能發揮強大的支援功能。

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Holo Decoy</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Deploys a holographic duplicate of Nova that can be controlled. The hologram deals 25% of Nova's damage and takes 25% less damage.</s>
無定型防護雲: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">投影誘餌</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">投射一個可讓玩家控制的諾娃全像投影。這個投影能造成相當於諾娃50%的傷害值，但是也會額外受到50%的傷害。</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Thanks to tireless research and development, Dominion scientists have replicated Egon Stetmann's prototype ionic force field and have redesigned it for more humane deployment and operation. Integration with a cybernetic body is no longer required.
無定型防護雲: 感謝自治聯盟科學家不眠不休地研發，他們已經重現了伊崗‧斯特曼之前製作的離子力場。在此之外還加以改造，在部署和操作方面更人性化，不需要依賴機械進行控制整合。

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Ionic Force Field</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Provides Nova with a shield that lasts <d time="10"/> and absorbs <d ref="Behavior,PersonalDefensiveMatrix,DamageResponse.ClampMaximum"/> damage from each incoming attack, up to a maximum of <d ref="Behavior,PersonalDefensiveMatrix,Modification.VitalMaxArray[Shields]"/> damage.</s>
無定型防護雲: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">離子力場</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">為諾娃提供一個護盾，持續<d time="10"/>。每次受到攻擊時護盾會吸收<d ref="Behavior,PersonalDefensiveMatrix,DamageResponse.ClampMaximum"/>點傷害，最多<d ref="Behavior,PersonalDefensiveMatrix,Modification.VitalMaxArray[Shields]"/>點傷害</s>。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Ghost Visors present mission critical intel to ghosts in the field. Each visor is also outfitted with a personal scanner system to keep its wearer apprised of battlefield conditions at all times.
無定型防護雲: 幽靈顯示鏡能為戰場上的幽靈特務提供與任務相關的關鍵情報。顯示鏡也都配有個人掃描系統，隨時替穿戴者回報當前的戰況。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Specialized optics and onboard triangulation make rangefinder goggles the ideal piece of gear for snipers, allowing for spotting and engagement at distances that would be otherwise impossible.
無定型防護雲: 這副測距護目鏡搭載了精準光學與三角測量定位，是狙擊手夢寐以求的裝備，讓他們可以在很遠的距離之外發現並狙擊敵人。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases Nova's vision and the range of her non-melee weapons by +2. Increases the range of Nova's melee weapons by +1.
無定型防護雲: 諾娃的視野範圍以及非近戰武器的攻擊距離提高2格，近戰武器的攻擊距離提高1格。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Specialized optics and onboard triangulation make the Rangefinder Oculus the ideal piece of gear for snipers, enabling spotting and engagement at distances that would be otherwise impossible.
無定型防護雲: 這副測距顯示儀搭載了精準光學與三角測量定位，是狙擊手夢寐以求的裝備，讓他們可以在很遠的距離之外發現並狙擊敵人。

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Rangefinder Oculus</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Increases the range of Nova's vision and non-melee weapons.</s>
無定型防護雲: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">測距顯示儀</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">提高諾娃的視野範圍以及非近戰武器的攻擊距離。</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Nova to take control of target enemy unit. Only one enemy unit can be controlled at a time. Effect lasts until cancelled. Cooldown timer begins once the effect has been cancelled.
無定型防護雲: 讓諾娃可以控制目標敵方單位，一次只能控制一個敵方單位。效果持續到取消為止，取消時開始計算冷卻時間。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Mind control is one of the most highly sought-after abilities among ghost academy recruits. Indoctrination Visors are calibrated to isolate such talents and amplify them exponentially. They are invaluable tools for infiltration operations that lack an inside contact.
無定型防護雲: 心靈控制是幽靈特務學院新兵最想學會的技能。支配顯示鏡經過精密調整，特別針對有天分的人，讓他們的能力以指數等級成長。在沒有臥底接應的情況下，這種顯示鏡在入侵行動中特別有用。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Lightweight armor that enables permanent cloaking. Adds +150 life, +1 armor, and +0.25 movement speed.
無定型防護雲: 可讓穿戴者永久匿蹤的輕型裝甲。生命值提高150點、裝甲值提高1點，並且移動速度提高0.25。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Reserved for ghosts on especially dangerous missions behind enemy lines, the Tactical Stealth Suit boasts optimizations that enable permanent cloaking without impacting its user's psionic energy.
無定型防護雲: 特別為潛入敵營或進行危險任務的幽靈特務所研發的戰術匿蹤套裝，可使穿戴者永久匿蹤而不會干擾其幽能。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Durable armor that allows Nova to jump up and down cliffs. Adds +250 life, +2 armor, and +0.5 movement speed. Cannot cloak while wearing.
無定型防護雲: 讓諾娃可跳上或跳下山崖的堅固裝甲。生命值提高250點、裝甲值提高2點，並且移動速度提高0.5。穿戴時無法匿蹤。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Originally developed for civilian construction projects, the Turbojet Jumpsuit's onboard thrusters and momentum absorption armor allow its user to rapidly scale sheer cliffs while also preventing injury.
無定型防護雲: 渦輪噴射服最初是為了民用建築工程所開發，它具備了推進器及動量吸收裝甲，讓使用者能迅速攀上陡峭的山崖而不會受傷。

Amorphous Armorcloud: [PH] Through use of specialized nanomachines, the user is granted higher damage resistance and movement abilities. Deadmans nuke sold separately.
無定型防護雲: 使用者可以用奈米機械提高對傷害的抗性或移動能力。可選購亡人港核彈。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Psionic amplification suit. Adds +200 life, +1 armor, +0.25 movement speed, and +100 energy. Increases energy regeneration rate by 50%. Can cloak while wearing.
無定型防護雲: 幽能強化戰鬥服。生命值提高200點，裝甲值提高1點，移動度提高0.25，能量值提高100點。能量恢復速度提高50%。穿戴時可匿蹤。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Designed around a miniaturized apollo reactor, the Apollo Infantry Suit adds its own energy output and storage to that of the ghost who wears it. This allows for tactics incorporating both prolonged stealth and intense psionic assault.
無定型防護雲: 這套阿波羅步兵戰鬥服以微型阿波羅反應爐為基礎來構思，穿上它的幽靈特務可強化能量的輸出與儲存的能量值。在戰術應用上不但能夠延長匿蹤時間，還能提高幽能突襲的力道。

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Apollo Infantry Suit</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Increases Nova's maximum energy and her energy regeneration rate.</s>
無定型防護雲: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">阿波羅步兵戰鬥服</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">提高諾娃的最大能量值和能量恢復速度。</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Prototype teleportation suit. Adds +200 life, +1 armor, and +0.25 movement speed. Allows Nova to teleport to a nearby targeted location. Nova is cloaked for <d ref="Behavior,NovaArmorBlinkSuitBlinkCloaked,Duration"/> seconds after teleporting.
無定型防護雲: 原型傳送戰鬥服。生命值提高200點，裝甲值提高1點，移動度提高0.25。讓諾娃可以傳送到附近目標地點，諾娃在傳送後會匿蹤<d ref="Behavior,NovaArmorBlinkSuitBlinkCloaked,Duration"/>秒。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Dominion scientists have modified tactical jump technology to approximate the protoss stalker's teleportation capabilities. Activating the device also appears to generate a temporary cloaking field--an unintended but most welcome development.
無定型防護雲: 自治聯盟科學家修改了戰術躍傳的技術，讓它與神族追獵者的傳送能力更加相似。啟動裝置之後還會產生一個暫時的匿蹤力場，雖然是個意外，但這樣的發展大家都很滿意。

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Phase Reactor Suit</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Prototype armor that allows Nova to teleport to a nearby targeted location. Nova is briefly cloaked after teleporting.</s>
無定型防護雲: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">相位反應爐戰鬥服</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">這件原型裝甲可以讓諾娃傳送到附近目標地點，諾娃在傳送之後會暫時匿蹤。</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Sniper rifle. Can use Snipe to deal <d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponCanisterRifleSnipe,Amount"/> damage to a target enemy unit at long range. Can attack ground and air units.
無定型防護雲: 狙擊步槍。可使用狙擊對遠距的目標敵方單位造成<d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponCanisterRifleSnipe,Amount"/>點傷害。可攻擊地面及空中單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The C-20A is a versatile firearm that combines powerful long-range sniper capabilities with ease of use in mid-range engagements. It improves upon the standard issue C-10 across all areas of performance.
無定型防護雲: C-20A是多功能的武器，具備強大的遠程狙擊功能，也可用於中程的戰鬥。它改良了C-10標準型號的缺點，各方面的性能表現也經過大幅強化。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Close range shotgun. Deals damage in a frontal arc. Can use Penetrating Blast to deal <d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,Amount"/> (<d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,Amount + Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,AttributeBonus[Light]"/> vs Light) damage to enemies in the arc. Can attack ground units.
無定型防護雲: 近程霰彈槍。能對前方扇形區域內的敵人造成傷害。可使用穿甲轟擊對扇形區域內的敵人造成<d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,Amount"/>（對輕甲單位額外造成<d ref="Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,Amount + Effect,NovaWeaponHellfireShotgunBlastDamage,AttributeBonus[Light]"/>）點傷害。可攻擊地面單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Designed for maximum infantry disruption, the Hellfire Shotgun detonates miniature explosives internally and then channels the blast through its reinforced muzzle to create a devastating arc of fire.
無定型防護雲: 獄焰霰彈槍是專門為阻擾步兵而設計的高效武器，原理是先在槍管內部引發小型爆炸，再讓爆炸通過經過強化的槍口，對前方的扇型區域噴出致命的烈焰。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Melee weapon. Ignores enemy armor. Can use Dash Attack to dash forward a short distance and deal <d ref="Effect,NovaPsiStrikeDamage,Amount"/> damage to enemy units in Nova's path. Can attack ground units.
無定型防護雲: 近戰武器，能無視敵人的裝甲與護盾值。諾娃可向前衝鋒一小段距離，對路徑上的敵方單位造成<d ref="Effect,NovaPsiStrikeDamage,Amount"/>點傷害。可攻擊地面單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The experimental Monomolecular Blade utilizes its wielder's psionic energy to hone an edge that has been sharpened to a microscopic degree, allowing it to cut through both physical armor and energy shields.
無定型防護雲: 實驗性的分子光刀會利用使用者的幽能，使刀鋒邊緣變得薄如分子，鋒利至極，可切穿物理裝甲以及能量護盾。

Amorphous Armorcloud: High output energy weapon. Melts targets into superheated plasma that damages nearby enemy units. Can use Plasma Shot to damage enemies and create additional plasma.
無定型防護雲: 高功率能量武器，可以將目標加熱為超高溫的電漿，並對周圍敵方單位造成傷害。可以使用電漿射擊對敵人造成傷害，並產生額外的電漿。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Usually deployed as heavy artillery, plasma weaponry boasts significant firepower when condensed into a portable form. Due to several safety concerns, it is highly advised that only properly trained field agents equip this experimental ordnance.
無定型防護雲: 電漿武器火力強大，一般被視為重型火砲，但是卻輕巧便於攜帶。基於安全考量，強烈建議只有受過完善訓練、擁有實戰經驗的特務才能配備這種實驗性軍用武器。

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Plasma Rifle</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">High output energy weapon. Melts enemies into pools of superheated plasma that damage nearby enemy units.</s>
無定型防護雲: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">電漿步槍</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">高輸出能量武器。能把敵人融化成一攤高熱電漿，對周圍的敵方單位造成傷害。</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Versatile melee and ranged weapon. Attacks deal area damage. Can use Fury of One to execute multiple attacks against enemies in a large target area. Can attack ground and air units.
無定型防護雲: 泛用型近戰與遠程武器，攻擊時會造成範圍傷害。可以使用狂烈斬對廣大目標範圍內的敵人造成多次傷害。可以攻擊地面和空中單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Considered wildly unconventional, the Blazefire Gunblade represents a school of thought amongst artisan gunsmiths that the perfect weapon can function well in all engagements. Designed as both a gun and a blade, it can only be wielded by the most accomplished martial artists.
無定型防護雲: 熾火槍刃非常與眾不同，它代表了其中一派製槍工匠的思維，就是完美的武器要在所有情況下都有良好的表現。融合了槍和刀的設計之後，只有武藝最精湛的高手才能駕馭它。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Equips Reapers with D8 Charges, increasing the damage they deal when attacking structures.
無定型防護雲: 替死神配備D-8炸藥，提高他們對建築物造成的傷害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Equips Hellbats and Hellions with Infernal Pre-Igniters, increasing the damage they deal to light units.
無定型防護雲: 替戰狼和惡狼配備地獄預燃器，提高他們對輕甲單位造成的傷害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Equips Banshees with Shockwave Missile Batteries, upgrading their attacks to damage multiple units in a straight line.
無定型防護雲: 替女妖轟炸機配備衝擊波飛彈發射器，提高他們對一直線上的敵人所造成的傷害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">Special Ordnance</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">Upgrades the equipped unit's weaponry with additional functionality.</s>
無定型防護雲: <s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipTitle">特殊軍備</s><n/><s val="NovaMissionRewardsTooltipSubtitle">升級單位配備的武器，獲得額外功能。</s>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Marauders to be trained at a Barracks without an attached Tech Lab.

召喚兩個教士的幻影分身

Amorphous Armorcloud: This hallucinated copy functions like the original unit, but it cannot use active abilities, cannot deal damage, and dies more easily. Hallucinations last <d time="60"/> before they disappear.
無定型防護雲: 此幻影分身可像真身一樣行動，但是無法造成傷害或使用技能，而且較容易死亡。幻影分身在消失前可持續<d time="60"/>。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Whenever the Adept's attack kills an enemy, a shockwave hits 2 nearby enemy units, dealing full attack damage.
無定型防護雲: 每當教士的攻擊殺死敵人，就會出現一道衝擊波再額外擊中兩個附近的敵方單位，對他們造成同等的攻擊傷害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Projects an invulnerable Shade that can move but cannot attack. After <d time="10"/>, the Adept teleports to the Shade's location.
無定型防護雲: 投射一個可移動但無法攻擊的無敵幽影。教士會在<d time="10"/>後傳送至幽影的所在位置。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Friendly Zerg units gain +<d ref="Behavior,AggressiveMutation,Modification.DamageDealtUnscaled[Melee]"/> attack damage for <d ref="Behavior,AggressiveMutation,Duration"/> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Affects ground units only.</c>
無定型防護雲: 友方蟲族單位的攻擊傷害提高<d ref="Behavior,AggressiveMutation,Modification.DamageDealtUnscaled[Melee]"/>點，持續<d ref="Behavior,AggressiveMutation,Duration"/>秒。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">只能作用於地面單位。</c>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Teleports all friendly units in the target area to the location of the Arbiter.
無定型防護雲: 將目標區域內所有友方單位傳送至審判者所在的位置。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Puts enemies in target area into stasis. Units in Stasis cannot move, attack, or be attacked or be affected by spells for <d ref="Behavior,ArbiterMPStasisField,Duration"/> seconds.
無定型防護雲: 使目標區域內的敵人陷入靜滯狀態。陷入靜滯狀態的單位無法移動、攻擊、被攻擊或者受到法術的影響，持續<d ref="Behavior,ArbiterMPStasisField,Duration"/>秒。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Releases interceptors to fight in an area for <d ref="Behavior,InterceptorTimedLife,Duration / 60"/> minutes.
無定型防護雲: 發射攔截機攻擊目標區域，持續<d ref="Behavior,InterceptorTimedLife,Duration / 60"/>分鐘。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the movement speed of <c val="ffff8a">Banshees</c>.
無定型防護雲: 提高<c val="ffff8a">女妖轟炸機</c>的移動速度。

Amorphous Armorcloud: This cocoon contains a Corruptor that is morphing into a Brood Lord.
無定型防護雲: 這顆蟲繭內有一隻腐化飛蟲，正在變形為寄生王蟲。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Vehicle-research structure. A Tech Lab can fit onto any production structure.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Enables:</c><n/>- Siege Tanks<n/>- Thor with Armory<n/>- Cyclones
無定型防護雲: 研發載具科技的建築。科技實驗室適用於任何生產類建築。<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">功能：</c><n/>- 可建造攻城坦克<n/>- 可建造雷神，需具備兵工廠<n/>- 可建造颶風飛彈車

Amorphous Armorcloud: Emits a stream of acid that deals <d ref="Effect,CausticLevel1Damage,Amount/Effect,CausticSprayLevel1Persistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="1"/> damage per second for <d ref="Effect,CausticSprayLevel1Persistent,PeriodCount*Effect,CausticSprayLevel1Persistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="1"/> seconds, then increases to <d ref="Effect,CausticLevel2Damage,Amount/Effect,CausticSprayLevel2Persistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="1"/> damage per second.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Channeled ability.</c><c val="#ColorAttackInfo"> Can only target enemy structures.</c>
無定型防護雲: 噴發一道酸液，每秒造成<d ref="Effect,CausticLevel1Damage,Amount/Effect,CausticSprayLevel1Persistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="1"/>點傷害，持續<d ref="Effect,CausticSprayLevel1Persistent,PeriodCount*Effect,CausticSprayLevel1Persistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="1"/>秒，接著傷害值會提高為每秒<d ref="Effect,CausticLevel2Damage,Amount/Effect,CausticSprayLevel2Persistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="1"/>點傷害。<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">導引技能。</c><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">只能以敵方建築為目標。</c>

Amorphous Armorcloud: After carefully aiming for <d ref="Effect,ChannelSnipeCreatePersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,ChannelSnipeCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="2"/> seconds while not taking damage, the Ghost fires a sniper round dealing <d ref="Effect,ChannelSnipeDamage,Amount"/> damage. Ignores armor.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Can only target biological units.</c>
無定型防護雲: 幽靈特務花上<d ref="Effect,ChannelSnipeCreatePersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,ChannelSnipeCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="2"/>秒專心瞄準目標，只要在此期間未受傷害干擾，便能射出精準一擊，造成<d ref="Effect,ChannelSnipeDamage,Amount"/>點傷害。無視裝甲值。<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">只能以生物單位為目標。</c>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Cloaks a target unit for 60 seconds until the target deals damage.
無定型防護雲: 使目標單位在發動攻擊前可匿蹤60秒。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Infects a the targeted unit with a parasite that deals <d ref="Effect,CorrosiveParasitePeriodicDamage,Amount"/> damage per <d time="1" precision="1"/> for <d ref="Behavior,CorrosiveParasite,Duration"/> seconds. Amorphous Armorcloud: Improves the <c val="ffff8a">Hellion's</c> Infernal Flamethrower to deal +5 damage vs. light units.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Does not affect Hellbat.</c>

Amorphous Armorcloud: <c val="ffff8a">Immortal</c> is automatically revived <d time="30"/> after death. 3 min cooldown.
無定型防護雲: <c val="ffff8a">不朽者</c>會在死後<d time="30"/>自動復活。冷卻時間3分鐘。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Enables <c val="ffff8a">Liberators</c> to transform into a siege ranged anti-ground unit.
無定型防護雲: 使<c val="ffff8a">解放者</c>變形為長程對地攻城單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases <c val="ffff8a">Cyclone</c> Lock On range from 6 to 9 and Locked On range from 12 to 15.
無定型防護雲: 使<c val="ffff8a">颶風飛彈車</c>的鎖定目標距離從6點提高至9點。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the attack range of <c val="ffff8a">Lurkers</c> by +3.
無定型防護雲: <c val="ffff8a">遁地獸</c>的攻擊距離提高3點。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Increases the <c val="ffff8a">Ravager's</c> Corrosive Bile range by 4.
無定型防護雲: <c val="ffff8a">劫毀蟲</c>的酸蝕體液攻擊距離提高4格。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows <c val="ffff8a">Hellions</c> and <c val="ffff8a">Hellbats</c> to transform between modes freely. In <c val="ffff8a">Hellion</c> mode they are fast scouts, but by activating <c val="ffff8a">Hellbat</c> mode they become close range combat units.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Assault unit. Regenerates life quickly when burrowed. Can morph into a Ravager.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Can attack ground units.</c>
無定型防護雲: 突擊單位。遁地時可快速恢復生命值。可以變形為劫毀蟲。<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">可攻擊地面單位。</c>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Contains upgrades for the Observer, Warp Prism, and Colossus.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Enables:</c><n/>- Colossi at the Robotics Facility<n/>- Disruptors at the Robotics Facility
無定型防護雲: 提供觀察者、傳輸稜鏡和巨像的升級。<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">功能：</c><n/>- 讓機械製造廠可躍傳巨像<n/>- 讓機械製造廠可躍傳裂光球

Amorphous Armorcloud: Regenerates <d ref="Behavior,SelfRepair,Modification.VitalRegenArray[Life]"/> life per second. Thor cannot move or attack until fully repaired or <d ref="Behavior,SelfRepair,Duration"/> seconds have passed.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Releases interceptors to attack the target area. Interceptors will remain in the area for up to <d ref="Behavior,InterceptorTimedLife,Duration"/> seconds or until killed.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Creates a cloud for <d ref="(Effect,BlindingCloudCP,PeriodCount + 1) * Effect,BlindingCloudCP,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/> seconds that reduces attack range of biological units under it to melee range.
無定型防護雲: 製造一片可持續<d ref="(Effect,BlindingCloudCP,PeriodCount + 1) * Effect,BlindingCloudCP,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/>秒的毒霧，在毒霧中的生物單位攻擊射程降低為近戰範圍。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Shells the targeted area for <d ref="Effect,BombardmentCreatePersistent,PeriodCount * Effect,BombardmentCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/> seconds, causing up to <d ref="Effect,BombardmentDamage,Amount * (Effect,BombardmentCreatePersistent,PeriodCount + 1)"/> (<d ref="(Effect,BombardmentDamage,Amount + Effect,BombardmentDamage,AttributeBonus[7]) * (Effect,BombardmentCreatePersistent,PeriodCount + 1)"/> vs Structures) damage to all ground units in the target area.
無定型防護雲: 轟炸目標區域，持續<d ref="Effect,BombardmentCreatePersistent,PeriodCount * Effect,BombardmentCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"/> 秒，對目標區域內的所有地面單位最多造成<d ref="Effect,BombardmentDamage,Amount * (Effect,BombardmentCreatePersistent,PeriodCount + 1)"/>（對建築<d ref="(Effect,BombardmentDamage,Amount + Effect,BombardmentDamage,AttributeBonus[7]) * (Effect,BombardmentCreatePersistent,PeriodCount + 1)"/>）點傷害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Vehicle-research structure. A Tech Lab can fit onto any production structure.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Enables:</c><n/>- Siege Tanks<n/>- Warhounds<n/>- Thor with Armory
無定型防護雲: 研發載具科技的建築。科技實驗室適用於任何生產類建築。<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">功能：</c><n/>- 可建造攻城坦克<n/>- 可建造戰犬<n/>- 可建造雷神，需具備兵工廠

Amorphous Armorcloud: Friendly structure gains an anti-light weapon. Lasts <d ref="Behavior,BuildingShield,Duration"/> seconds.
無定型防護雲: 友方建築獲得反輕甲武器，持續<d ref="Behavior,BuildingShield,Duration"/>秒。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Target structure is phased out of existence for <d ref="Behavior,BuildingStasis,Duration"/> seconds. It cannot be attacked, use abilities, provide power, or provide tech.<n/><n/><c val="#ColorAttackInfo">Massive structures are immune.</c>

Amorphous Armorcloud: Burrow and charge towards a unit. Range of 8.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Buries the Lurker underground. Burrowed Lurkers are unable to move, but are able to attack. They cannot be seen without detection.
無定型防護雲: 讓遁地獸遁入地底。遁地後無法移動，但可以發動攻擊，而且敵方需透過偵測才看得見。

Amorphous Armorcloud: With the touch of a button, the Cleaning Bot collects dirt, pet hair and other debris from all areas.
無定型防護雲: 只要一個按鈕，清潔機器人便會把所有區域的灰塵、寵物毛髮與碎塊清除乾淨。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Banelings to automatically target structures.<n/><n/>Banelings deal <d ref="Effect,VolatileBurstU2,Amount"/> damage to structures.
無定型防護雲: 允許毒爆蟲將建築列為自動攻擊的目標。<n/><n/>毒爆蟲可對建築造成<d ref="Effect,VolatileBurstU2,Amount"/>點傷害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Allows Banelings to automatically target structures.<n/><n/>Banelings deal <d ref="Effect,HotSSplitterlingVolatileBurstBuildingDamageMedium,Amount"/> damage to structures.

Amorphous Armorcloud: Focuses on producing devastating air units.<n/><n/>Example Units:<n/><c val="FFFFFF">T: Battlecruiser, Banshee, Viking<n/>Z: Broodlord, Mutalisk, Corruptor<n/>P: Tempest, Carrier, Voidray</c><n/><n/><c val="0080ff">Only one late game selection per A.I.</c><n/>Active: PLAYERS
無定型防護雲: 著重於生產威力強大的空中單位。<n/><n/>單位可能包括：<n/><c val="FFFFFF">人類：戰巡艦、女妖轟炸機和維京戰機<n/>蟲族：寄生王蟲、飛螳和腐化飛蟲<n/>神族：暴風艦、航空母艦和虛空艦</c><n/><n/><c val="0080ff">每個A.I.只能選擇一種後期模式</c><n/>啟用：PLAYERS

Amorphous Armorcloud: Focuses on producing a large amount of basic units.<n/><n/>Example Units:<n/><c val="FFFFFF">T: Marine, Marauder, Medivac<n/>Z: Zergling, Baneling, Roach, Infestor<n/>P: Zealot, Stalker, Sentry, Immortal</c><n/><n/><c val="0080ff">Only one late game selection per A.I.</c><n/>Active: PLAYERS
無定型防護雲: 主要著重於生產大量的基礎單位。<n/><n/>單位可能包括：<n/><c val="FFFFFF">人類：陸戰隊、掠奪者和醫療艇<n/>蟲族：異化蟲、毒爆蟲、蟑螂和感染蟲<n/>神族：狂戰士、追獵者、哨衛和不朽者</c><n/><n/><c val="0080ff">每個A.I.只能選擇一種後期模式</c><n/>啟用：PLAYERS

Amorphous Armorcloud: Focuses on units to distract or weaken the enemy.<n/><n/>Example Units:<n/><c val="FFFFFF">T: Ghost, Raven, Widow Mine<n/>Z: Infestor, Swarm Host, Viper<n/>P: Dark Templar, High Templar, Oracle</c><n/><n/><c val="0080ff">Only one late game selection per A.I.</c><n/>Active: PLAYERS
無定型防護雲: 著重於生產弱化或分散敵人注意力的單位。<n/><n/>單位可能包括：<n/><c val="FFFFFF">人類：幽靈特務、渡鴉和寡婦詭雷<n/>蟲族：感染蟲、百生獸和飛蟒<n/>神族：黑暗聖堂武士、高階聖堂武士和先知艦</c><n/><n/><c val="0080ff">每個A.I.只能選擇一種後期模式</c><n/>啟用：PLAYERS

Amorphous Armorcloud: Focuses on producing the most powerful units.<n/><n/>Example Units:<n/><c val="FFFFFF">T: Siege Tank, Thor<n/>Z: Ultralisk, Broodlord<n/>P: Archon, Colossus</c><n/><n/><c val="0080ff">Only one late game selection per A.I.</c><n/>Active: PLAYERS
無定型防護雲: 著重於生產火力強大的單位。<n/><n/>單位可能包括：<n/><c val="FFFFFF">人類：攻城坦克和雷神<n/>蟲族：雷獸和寄生王蟲<n/>神族：執政官和巨像</c><n/><n/><c val="0080ff">每個A.I.只能選擇一種後期模式</c><n/>啟用：PLAYERS

Amorphous Armorcloud: A.I. expands quickly with very little defense.<n/>Focuses on economy and tech and makes a very basic army.<n/><n/><c val="00ffff">Only one opening build selection per A.I.</c><n/>Active: PLAYERS
無定型防護雲: A.I.會以最低防禦來快速擴展勢力。<n/>主要著重於經濟與科技的發展，只會建立基礎部隊。<n/><n/><c val="00ffff">每個A.I.只能選擇一種開局模式</c><n/>啟用：PLAYERS

Amorphous Armorcloud: A.I. delays attacking until it has more powerful units.<n/>Usually expands to a second base.<n/><n/>Example Units:<n/><c val="FFFFFF">T: Siege Tank, Banshee<n/>Z: Hydralisk, Infestor<n/>P: Immortal</c><n/><n/><c val="00ffff">Only one opening build selection per A.I.</c><n/>Active: PLAYERS
無定型防護雲: A.I.在未獲得強大的單位之前會延緩進攻。<n/>通常會擴展至第2個分基地。<n/><n/>單位可能包括：<n/><c val="FFFFFF">人類：攻城坦克和女妖轟炸機<n/>蟲族：刺蛇、感染蟲<n/>神族：不朽者</c><n/><n/><c val="00ffff">每個A.I.只能選擇一種開局模式</c><n/>啟用：PLAYERS

Amorphous Armorcloud: A.I. builds up for an early game timing attack.<n/>Usually does not expand to a second base.<n/><n/>Example Builds:<n/><c val="FFFFFF">T: Marine and Marauder with Stimpack<n/>Z: Zergling, Baneling, Roach<n/>P: Zealot, Stalker with Blink</c><n/><n/><c val="00ffff">Only one opening build selection per A.I.</c><n/>Active: PLAYERS
無定型防護雲: A.I.會準備在遊戲前期展開一波快攻。<n/>通常不會擴展至第2個分基地。<n/><n/>發展模式可能包括：<n/><c val="FFFFFF">人類：具備戰鬥藥劑的陸戰隊和掠奪者<n/>蟲族：異化蟲、毒爆蟲和蟑螂<n/>神族：狂戰士和具備瞬移的追獵者</c><n/><n/><c val="00ffff">每個A.I.只能選擇一種開局模式</c><n/>啟用：PLAYERS

Amorphous Armorcloud: A.I. attacks as soon as possible with basic units.<n/><n/>Example Units:<n/><c val="FFFFFF">T: Marines<n/>Z: Zerglings<n/>P: Zealots</c><n/><n/><c val="00ffff">Only one opening build selection per A.I.</c><n/>Active: PLAYERS
無定型防護雲: A.I.會以基礎單位盡早發動攻擊。<n/><n/>單位可能包括：<n/><c val="FFFFFF">人類：陸戰隊<n/>蟲族：異化蟲<n/>神族：狂戰士</c><n/><n/><c val="00ffff">每個A.I.只能選擇一種開局模式</c><n/>啟用：PLAYERS

無定型防護雲: 處於較高地形的單位在進行攻擊時，能避免自身遭受反擊。若要反制此情況，可將部隊移至坡道或派遣空中部隊隨行，以取得可進行反擊的視野。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Xel'Naga Towers provide vision across a large area. Stand a unit near a Xel'Naga Tower to control it.
無定型防護雲: 薩爾納加監視塔可監視一片廣大區域。派一個單位駐守在薩爾納加監視塔附近來控制它。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Rocks can be destroyed to open up new paths.
無定型防護雲: 摧毀岩石即可開闢新的路徑。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Your starting area will eventually run out of resources. Expand to new resource locations to secure additional income.
無定型防護雲: 你終將用盡起始區域的所有資源，擴展新的資源區以獲取額外收入。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Expanding to a new resource location early in a game is risky, but the extra income is sometimes worth the risk.
無定型防護雲: 在遊戲初期就將勢力擴張至新的資源區的風險很高，不過有時候這筆額外的收入的確值得你冒這個險。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Weapon and armor upgrades affect existing and future units, so their benefits quickly add up over the course of longer games.
無定型防護雲: 武器和裝甲升級會影響現有和未來生產的單位，因此對戰的時間越長，這些升級所累積的好處就會越多。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The key to a strong economy is constantly training SCVs, Probes, or Drones.
無定型防護雲: 建立強大經濟的關鍵就是不斷地生產太空工程車、探測機或工蟲。

Amorphous Armorcloud: It takes 3 SCVs, Probes, or Drones to optimally harvest a Mineral Field or Vespene Geyser.
無定型防護雲: 若想達到採集最佳化，就需指派3個工作單位（太空工程車、探測機或工蟲）至每個晶礦或高能瓦斯湧源。

Amorphous Armorcloud: You can use control groups to train units without even looking at your base.
無定型防護雲: 只需利用編隊功能即可訓練單位，所以沒有必要為此查看基地。

Amorphous Armorcloud: You can select all nearby units of a given type by double-clicking on a unit, or by holding CTRL and clicking on a unit.
無定型防護雲: 雙擊一個單位或按住 CTRL 鍵後點擊一個單位，即可選取附近與該單位類型相同的所有單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Rich Mineral Fields are yellow, and can be harvested faster than normal Mineral Fields.
無定型防護雲: 黃色晶礦即高產量晶礦，採集此晶礦的速度會比普通晶礦來得快。

Amorphous Armorcloud: To win a multiplayer game, destroy all enemy structures or be the last player still in the game.
無定型防護雲: 若要在多人對戰中獲得勝利，須消滅所有敵方建築或成為遊戲中最後的僅存者。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Achievements are online trophies for accomplishing various goals in the game. View your profile to see what achievements you can earn.
無定型防護雲: 當你在遊戲中達成目標時就會得到線上獎章，而該獎章即是你所獲得的成就。查看你的個人資訊來了解你可以獲得哪些成就。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Weapons that list damage as "vs Armored: 5" do a total of 5 damage to targets that are considered Armored.
無定型防護雲: 標示為「對重甲：5」的武器可對重甲目標造成5點傷害。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Cloaked or burrowed units cannot be attacked unless spotted by a detector, such as a Raven, Observer, or Overseer.
無定型防護雲: 除非有渡鴉、觀察者或監察王蟲等偵測單位進行偵測，否則無法攻擊匿蹤或遁地的單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Detectors like Ravens, Observers, and Overseers can spot the difference between Protoss Hallucinations and real units.
無定型防護雲: 像渡鴉、觀察者及監察王蟲這類偵測單位能夠發現神族的幻影分身及本體之間的差異。

Amorphous Armorcloud: If you have a microphone, you can hold down the<k val="PTT"/> key to talk to your allies.
無定型防護雲: 如果你有安裝麥克風，按住<k val="PTT"/> 即可和盟友通話。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Press<k val="CameraFollow"/> to have the game follow a selected unit as it moves across the battlefield.
無定型防護雲: 按下<k val="CameraFollow"/> 後可使遊戲鏡頭跟著選取的單位移動。

Amorphous Armorcloud: SCVs can be used to repair buildings or mechanical units. The more SCVs repairing, the faster the repair is complete.
無定型防護雲: 可以使用太空工程車來修復建築或是機械單位。投入的太空工程車越多，修復的速度也就越快。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Use several SCVs to keep vital defenses or combat units alive during a fight.
無定型防護雲: 在戰鬥中，可使用太空工程車來修復主要的防禦工事或戰鬥單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Use Medivacs to support large infantry groups. Use their transport abilities to take infantry behind enemy lines for surprise attacks.
無定型防護雲: 使用醫療艇來支援大批步兵部隊。善用他們的運輸能力來將步兵送至敵軍後方以進行突襲。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Hellions do damage in a straight line with their flame thrower. Get close to packs of enemies to maximize your damage.
無定型防護雲: 惡狼能以火焰發射器對一直線上的目標造成傷害。攻擊時靠近成群結隊的敵人可以使你所造成的傷害最大化。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Siege Tanks cannot fire at units that get too close. Put other units or structures in front of your Siege Tanks to keep the enemy back.
無定型防護雲: 攻城坦克無法對距離過近的單位開火。在攻城坦克前面放置其他單位或是建築，讓坦克和敵人保持點距離。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Reapers can jump up and down short cliffs. Use them to scout the enemy or make surprise attacks against their workers.
無定型防護雲: 死神能在低崖間上下移動。運用這點對敵人進行偵察，或是對敵方工作單位發動突襲。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Place Supply Depots in narrow areas to block enemy access to your base. Lower them when you want to leave.
無定型防護雲: 在狹窄區域放置補給站，以擋住敵人通往己方基地的行進路線。當你想要讓單位通過時，降下補給站即可。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Use Stimpacks to make your infantry more dangerous in battle. Use Medivacs to heal the damage done by Stimpacks.
無定型防護雲: 使用戰鬥藥劑可以讓步兵單位在戰場上變得更加勇猛。別忘了派遣醫療艇來治療因使用戰鬥藥劑而受傷的單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Orbital Command Centers can call-down MULEs to gather additional resources. Use MULEs every chance you get.
無定型防護雲: 星軌指揮總部能夠空投礦騾來採集額外資源。不要錯過任何可使用礦騾的機會。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Building extra Barracks, Factories, and Starports enables you to train more troops at a time.
無定型防護雲: 建造更多的兵營、軍工廠及星際港，使你能夠一次生產更多部隊。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Once started, Protoss structures construct themselves, freeing up the Probe to do other things.
無定型防護雲: 一旦開始躍傳，神族建築便會自行完成後續工作，此時探測機便可以去進行其他作業。

Amorphous Armorcloud: You can rapidly train Probes by using the Nexus' Chrono Boost ability on the Nexus itself.
無定型防護雲: 你可以將星核的超時空加速技能用於星核本身，即可快速地訓練探測機。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Warp Gates allow you to rapidly train units at any location where you have power.
無定型防護雲: 空間之門可以讓你快速地躍傳單位到任何處於你能源範圍內的地點。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Stalkers can blink to anyplace that you can see. Use fliers to see up cliffs to gain access to high ground areas.
無定型防護雲: 追獵者能瞬移至視野範圍內的任何一處。善用空中單位將視野拓展至崖邊以瞬移至高處。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Void Rays do more damage the longer they fight the enemy. Try to protect your Void Rays so they can get to full power.
無定型防護雲: 虛空艦專注攻擊於同一個敵方單位越久就能造成越多傷害。保護你的虛空艦，使它們能達到火力全開的階段。

Amorphous Armorcloud: A Colossus can walk up short cliffs. Use this ability to protect your Colossus or to make surprise attacks.
無定型防護雲: 巨像可行走於低矮的山崖間。使用這個技能來保護巨像或進行奇襲。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Sentries can create Force Fields to block movement. Use them to keep enemies out of your base, or to block the approach of melee units.
無定型防護雲: 哨衛能產生力場來阻礙敵人行進。善用這點來防止敵人入侵你的基地，或是用以阻擋前來侵犯的近戰單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Sentries can create Hallucinations that look like your units. Use them to confuse or distract the enemy from your real units.
無定型防護雲: 哨衛能做出外貌近似己方單位的幻影分身，可以用來擾亂或迷惑敵人，讓對方分不清本體在哪。

Amorphous Armorcloud: High Templars do a lot of damage with their Psi Storm ability. Try to use up all of their energy before merging them into Archons.
無定型防護雲: 高階聖堂武士能以幽能風暴造成大量傷害。在將他們融合成執政官之前，試著用盡他們全部的能量。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Immortals have a special shield that reduces attacks to 10 points of damage. Use them against powerful units like Siege Tanks or Ultralisks.
無定型防護雲: 不朽者擁有特殊護盾，可將所受到的攻擊傷害降低至10點。善用不朽者來對抗像攻城坦克或雷獸等攻擊力強大的單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Building extra Gateways, Stargates, and Robotics Facilities enables you to train more troops at a time.
無定型防護雲: 建造更多的傳送門、星際之門及機械製造廠，使你能夠一次生產更多部隊。

Amorphous Armorcloud: A Drone is used up every time you make a Zerg structure. Be sure to replace those Drones to maintain your income.
無定型防護雲: 每次突變產生一個蟲族建築就會耗掉一隻工蟲。記得孵化更多工蟲來彌補，以維持收入。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Select a Hatchery and right-click on a Mineral Field to cause newly trained Drones to automatically harvest minerals.
無定型防護雲: 選取一個孵化所，然後右鍵點擊晶礦場，即可讓之後孵化出來的工蟲自動採集晶礦。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Zerg units move more quickly on creep. Spread creep wherever you can to speed up your forces.
無定型防護雲: 蟲族單位在蟲苔上移動較快。盡量四處散佈蟲苔來提高部隊的速度。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Queens can cause Hatcheries to spawn additional larva. Build one Queen per Hatchery and use the ability as often as possible.
無定型防護雲: 后蟲能讓孵化所孵化更多幼蟲。為每個孵化所都配上一隻后蟲，並且盡量多使用這項技能。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Roaches regenerate very quickly while burrowed. Burrow your wounded Roaches so they can regenerate and then return to battle.
無定型防護雲: 蟑螂在遁地時的再生速度非常快。讓受傷的蟑螂先遁入地底，等牠們恢復生命值後再投入戰鬥之中。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Use Mutalisks to attack undefended enemy workers. When the enemy comes to defend, fly away and attack elsewhere.
無定型防護雲: 利用飛螳攻擊毫無防禦之力的敵方工作單位，當敵人回防的時候，飛離現場轉而攻擊其他地方。

Amorphous Armorcloud: If you need more Larvae to train troops more rapidly, build additional Hatcheries.
無定型防護雲: 如果你需要更多幼蟲來加快部隊的生產速度，可以多建一些孵化所。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Infestors and upgraded Roaches can move while burrowed. Use this ability to infiltrate enemy territory unobserved.
無定型防護雲: 感染蟲和進化後的蟑螂能在遁地時移動。善用此能力以神不知鬼不覺地入侵敵方領地。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Infestors can use Neural Parasite to control enemy units. Use this on dangerous enemies like Siege Tanks and Colossi.
無定型防護雲: 感染蟲可以使用神經寄生來控制敵方單位。善用此技能在攻城坦克和巨像這種危險的敵人身上。

Amorphous Armorcloud: You can turn on the 'Display Build Grid' option to understand how to use buildings to block ground movement.  You can find it in the Options menu's Gameplay tab.
無定型防護雲: 你可以開啟顯示建造網格選項來了解如何利用建築物來阻斷地面單位的移動路徑。你可以在選項內的遊戲內容找到此功能。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The races you play in campaign are heavily modified.  Your units and structures in multiplayer are very different than what you have played in campaign.
無定型防護雲: 你在劇情戰役中玩的種族有其專屬的設定。多人對戰跟劇情戰役中的單位與建築有許多不同的地方。

Amorphous Armorcloud: You can watch replays of your games to learn how to better play the game.
無定型防護雲: 你可以觀看你的戰鬥錄影來研究如何增進自己的實力。

Amorphous Armorcloud: You can practice against the A.I. to improve your strategies.
無定型防護雲: 你可以和A.I.練習對戰來改進自己的戰術。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Try to anticipate what your opponent's next move will be so you can counter their next attack or defense.
無定型防護雲: 試著預測對手的下一步以破解他們的攻擊或防禦戰術。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Gather as many resources as you can and spend them all. The larger army almost always wins.
無定型防護雲: 盡你所能採集最多的資源並且將其全數花光。部隊數量多的一方通常能獲得勝利。

Amorphous Armorcloud: StarCraft II is played by professional gamers. Watch pro matches to learn new strategies.
無定型防護雲: 《星海爭霸II》有許多職業級的玩家。你可以看他們的比賽來學習新的戰術。

Amorphous Armorcloud: StarCraft II is free to play! Invite your friends to download the game at StarCraft2.com!
無定型防護雲: 《星海爭霸II》可以免費遊玩了！邀請你的朋友到StarCraft2.com下載遊戲！

Amorphous Armorcloud: Don’t forget that you can put your micro to the test in 30 interesting challenges in the StarCraft Master Arcade game!
無定型防護雲: 別忘了，你可以在「星海大師」遊樂場遊戲的30個挑戰中測試你的微控實力！

Amorphous Armorcloud: The units and structures in a multiplayer game are different than what you experience in campaign.
無定型防護雲: 多人對戰跟劇情戰役中所用的單位與建築並不相同。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The StarCraft II ladder is designed to match you against opponents of your skill level. Over time you will win about half your games.
無定型防護雲: 《星海爭霸II》的天梯系統會安排你跟實力相近的對手進行對戰。整體來說，你的獲勝機率大約會維持在一半。

Amorphous Armorcloud: StarCraft II is a game of skill and strategy. Practice is the only way to get better.
無定型防護雲: 《星海爭霸II》是一款著重操控技巧與戰術的遊戲。只有不斷地練習才能增進你的實力。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Highly trained battlefield commanders, adepts utilize Purifier technology to amplify their psionic potential. They are capable of projecting shades of themselves and teleporting across great distances.
無定型防護雲: 教士是訓練有素的戰場指揮官，使用淨化者科技來強化自身的幽能。他們可以投射出自身的幽影，並藉此傳送一大段距離。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Daelaam's starforges may be capable of reconstructing the Purifier ordnance from Glacius, but they have yet to match the optimal performance of Karax's original prototypes.
無定型防護雲: 達蘭的星穹冶煉廠或許能重建葛拉西斯的淨化者兵器，不過成品的性能跟原本由凱拉克所設計的原型機相比，還有一段距離。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Nostalgic sentiment has been growing among the templar after the End War. Some adepts show their pride by wearing formal ceremonial armor from bygone days.
無定型防護雲: 末日之戰之後，緬懷往日時光的風潮逐漸興起。某些教士開始穿著過去的正式禮儀護甲，來展現他們的榮耀。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Even battle-hardened Ihan-rii adepts needed time to get their bearings after a distress signal woke them from deep stasis on the fringes of the Koprulu Sector.
無定型防護雲: 就算是老練的伊翰利教士，在求救訊號傳到克普魯星區邊疆地帶，將他們從靜滯狀態喚醒之後，也需要一段時間才能搞清楚狀況。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Refined by Phase-smith Karax, these AI warriors have become central figures in Purifier armies, impressing all who see them with their agility and refinement.
無定型防護雲: 經過相位工匠凱拉克精密調整後，這些搭配人工智慧的戰士成為淨化者部隊的中堅份子，它們展現出來的敏捷身手和調整的精密程度令人讚嘆。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Despite its recent development, the psionic amplification technology used by the Daelaam's adepts has already been reverse engineered by the Tal'darim and equipped on their most promising warriors.
無定型防護雲: 雖然時間還不長，不過塔達力姆運用逆向解析來研究達蘭教士身上的幽能強化科技，並且配備在這群前途無量的戰士身上。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Archons boast overwhelming psionic power, but it comes at a high cost. Two templar must sacrifice themselves for an archon to be formed, making each one an embodiment of unparalleled heroism.
無定型防護雲: 雖然執政官的幽能非常強大，但是必須付出不小的代價：必須犧牲兩名聖堂武士，才能形成一名執政官。因此，每一名執政官都體現出無與倫比的英雄氣概。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The armory is built around several turbines. These keep the building within temperature specifications while researchers work tirelessly to improve terran war machinery.
無定型防護雲: 兵工廠在建造時就附有數座風機，可以維持建築物在一定的溫度範圍內，讓其中的研究人員可以不斷努力改進人類的戰爭機器。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Dominion's latest advances in neosteel armor were developed through the molecular examination of xel'naga constructs recovered by special forces teams.
無定型防護雲: 自治聯盟在新型鋼鐵裝甲上的最新進展，是透過對特種部隊取回的薩爾納加石像進行分子層次研究而成的。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Reports of protoss wandering into Tyrador IX's armories led to accusations of espionage, though Ihan-rii leadership insisted that these incidents were the result of settlers mistaking the gleaming structures for terran museums.
無定型防護雲: 神族在泰拉朵九號星兵工廠附近徘徊的報導，引發出一連串間諜活動的指控。伊翰利領導階層堅持這只是當地居民將發光建築誤認為人類博物館的意外事件。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Even the highly advanced protoss appreciate the myriad applications of vespene gas. They developed assimilators to harvest this useful resource.
無定型防護雲: 即使是科技最先進的神族，也需要這種多用途的高能瓦斯。他們開發出了瓦斯處理廠來收集這種實用的資源。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Tal'darim assimilators greedily wrench vespene gas from the ground, triggering earthquakes that decimate surrounding ecosystems.
無定型防護雲: 塔達利姆瓦斯處理廠從土地中貪婪地搾取高能瓦斯，強度甚至引發了地震，破壞周圍的生態系統。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The Ihan-rii protoss consider themselves very generous for allowing terrans to continue living on, let alone mining vespene gas from, their ancient and sacred homeworld, which they call Arakyr.
無定型防護雲: 伊翰利神族認為自己相當大方，因為他們長久以來允許人類住在阿拉基爾，並且在當地開採高能瓦斯，這顆星球可是他們的古老聖地。

Amorphous Armorcloud: First observed during the Siege of Cask, the baneling is a highly volatile and explosive combat strain evolved from the zergling. Few materials can resist the acidic burst released upon their detonation.
無定型防護雲: 毒爆蟲首次登場是在卡斯克攻城戰，這是一種不穩定而且容易爆炸的戰鬥品系，由異化蟲進化而成。沒有多少物質能抵抗牠們爆炸時噴發出來的強酸。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The recreation of the baneling posed a unique problem for engineers, as their carefully harvested acid sacs kept melting through the surrounding plate infrastructure. Eventually, they made it work.
無定型防護雲: 工程師重新打造毒爆蟲時，遭遇到了一個獨特的問題，就是他們小心採來的酸液囊，總是會腐蝕穿過周圍的金屬板結構。不過工程師們最終還是解決了這個問題。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The zerg hive cluster must have a baneling nest to add the baneling breed's genetic code. Once a nest is in place, any zergling on the field can be commanded to form a fleshy chrysalis for a brief pupation state, and then it will burst forth as a baneling--a foul, bloated creature with bulbous, acid-filled green sacs pulsating on its back.
無定型防護雲: 蟲族的蟲巢裡一定要有一個毒爆蟲巢，來提供毒爆蟲品系的基因編碼。一旦毒爆蟲巢就緒，就可以命令任何在戰場上的異化蟲短暫進入蟲蛹狀態，然後再孵化為毒爆蟲。這是一種惡臭、腫脹的生物，背上還有充滿酸液的綠色囊腫。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The upper half of the Simulant baneling nest is held aloft by the same antigravity technology deployed in terran battlecruisers.
無定型防護雲: 擬態機甲毒爆蟲巢的上半部運用了與人類戰巡艦相同的反重力科技，使其漂浮在空中。

Amorphous Armorcloud: To trigger the collapse of key terran fortifications, Cerberus baneling nests have been rigged to detonate in cave networks across Tyrador IX.
無定型防護雲: 地獄犬為了摧毀人類的重要防禦設施而改造了毒爆蟲巢，使其能夠在泰拉朵九號星的洞穴通道網路中引爆。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Inspired by the banelings in Kerrigan's Swarm, Dehaka has encouraged the mutation of a similar strain of creatures within his pack.
無定型防護雲: 德哈卡從凱莉根蟲群的毒爆蟲獲得啟發，決定在他自己的原生族群裡面挑出相似的品系進行突變。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The return on investment for replacing a baneling's entire nervous system, only to have it immediately blow up, is dubious. Luckily, Cerberus's clients have quite a lot of money to spend.
無定型防護雲: 為了讓毒爆蟲馬上引爆，投入大筆資金替換神經系統所獲得的效益相當讓人懷疑。但幸好地獄犬的客戶們手頭上都有大筆資金。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The spine-like growths of Leviathan Brood zerglings remain present on the acid sacs of their banelings. Even a total metamorphosis is incapable of changing the chaotic nature of their core essence.
無定型防護雲: 利維坦群落所演化出的毒爆蟲，牠們的酸液囊仍然保留了異化蟲身上的脊狀物。即使整個形態完全改變，仍無損牠們胡作非為的本性。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Procyon Industries designed banshees to be both economical and effective. Built specifically to provide air support for frontline infantry, they are ideal aircraft for tactical strikes.
無定型防護雲: 恆星工業組織所設計的女妖轟炸機，兼具了成本和效率兩個優點。這種轟炸機的主要功能是為前線步兵單位提供空中支援，是非常理想的戰術攻擊空中單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Dominion engineers have made critical upgrades in the banshee's twin VTOL turbofans, enabling superior stability and performance when paired with the new vertical stabilizer in the rear of the craft.
無定型防護雲: 自治聯盟的工程師在女妖轟炸機的垂直升降渦輪風扇方面有重大突破，在機體後方加裝垂直穩定器之後，大幅提升了穩定度和整體效能。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Mercenaries are infamous for cobbling together pieces of equipment on their machinery, and these banshees are no exception. Rumor has it that some bulldozer parts are involved in this particular design.
無定型防護雲: 把一堆零件加裝在機械上面，已經成為傭兵惡名昭彰的特色；他們的女妖轟炸機當然也不例外。據說，這個特殊的設計還用上了一些推土機零件。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Though most Tyrador banshees were wiped out in the first wave of the Cerberus zerg attack, one seasoned pilot managed to take down three ultralisks first.
無定型防護雲: 儘管大多數的泰拉朵女妖轟炸機都在第一波的地獄犬蟲族攻勢中被殲滅了，但還是有一位老練的飛行員解決了三頭雷獸。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Through a series of backdoor deals, the Umojan Protectorate has been able to acquire a limited number of banshees from Procyon Industries, although the company maintains that they were stolen.
無定型防護雲: 在數次地下交易之後，尤摩捷護衛軍總算可以從恆星工業組織取得幾台女妖轟炸機，而工業組織方面則宣稱他們被偷了。

Amorphous Armorcloud: A home-away-from-home for terran infantry personnel, terran barracks are sterile, mobile, and capable of efficient deployment.
無定型防護雲: 人類步兵遠離家園時的棲身之處，兵營不但清潔，具機動性，而且相當容易部署。

Amorphous Armorcloud: A liquid nitrogen cooling system gives the special forces barracks an eerie blue glow.
無定型防護雲: 液態氮冷卻系統讓特種部隊的兵營閃耀著怪異的藍色光輝。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Each Knights of Tyrador barracks features a five-star robotic kitchen and a full-service spa--for officers only, of course.
無定型防護雲: 每一座泰拉朵騎士的兵營都配有五星級自動化廚房，以及全面性的健康休閒服務，不過僅供軍官階層使用。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Battlecruisers often serve as mobile command headquarters during extended military campaigns. They are flying fortresses outfitted with heavy armor and imposing weaponry.
無定型防護雲: 在戰線拉長的時候，常常會以戰巡艦當作行動指揮總部，可說是兼具厚實防禦和強力武器的空中要塞。

Amorphous Armorcloud: After a lengthy research and development process, the newly upgraded Moirai class battlecruisers were approved for exclusive use by Dominion Special Forces.
無定型防護雲: 經歷長時間的研發與改良，全新升級的命運女神級戰巡艦，終於獲准編入自治聯盟特種部隊的專屬單位。

Amorphous Armorcloud: These ferocious vessels have been modified to suit the mercenaries' preferences. However, few onlookers live long enough to admire their handiwork.
無定型防護雲: 這批威力強大的艦隊，被改裝成符合傭兵品味的船艦。不過，看到這些船艦的人通常很快就死了，沒幾個能活著讚嘆他們優秀的船艦改裝技術。

Amorphous Armorcloud: The command decks of Brood War-era battlecruisers had a lower profile, with port and starboard viewdecks to ensure maximum visibility in the event of a zerg ambush.
無定型防護雲: 群落戰爭時期的戰巡艦艦橋外型比較低調，並且可以直接觀察左右舷的狀況，以確保能監控到蟲族入侵的狀況。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Assailed by Cerberus zerg, the Knights of Tyrador dispatched a Behemoth-class battlecruiser to request aid from the stone ships waiting in silent orbit.
無定型防護雲: 在地獄犬蟲族的進攻之下，泰拉朵騎士們派出了巨獸級戰巡艦，向星軌上等待著的石製戰艦求援。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Umojan battlecruisers feature redesigned neosteel plating, as well as refinements to the Yamato cannons that make them particularly distinctive in battles.
無定型防護雲: 尤摩捷戰巡艦擁有重新設計的新型鋼鐵合金板，以及針對大和砲的調整，讓它們在戰鬥中特別顯眼。

Amorphous Armorcloud: Evolved to rule the skies, the brood lords are terrifying creatures that hurl their destructive broodlings at enemy forces.
